examples: He rented space in a little strip mall and gave his shop the fancy name of Mr. Ben's Coiffure.
A pad of material, typically hair, worn as part of a woman's coiffure to puff out her own hair.
Would her pearls, her coiffure, help her after all endure the presence of her unspeakable brother?
The chef, sporting stretch jeans, a T-shirt, and a Grace Jones coiffure, is dancing for the crowd.
But thanks to his iPad, this musical chameleon of coiffure has added a few more titles to his resume: technologist, tinker, producer.
